title: A Villain Is Born?!
overview: Hiiragi Utena is just an average magical girl fan who longs to be like the superheroines she idolizes. Suddenly, a mascot character offers to make her dream come true.

title: Her Name Is Magia Baiser!
overview: Hiiragi's been forced into becoming a villain! Now that she's gotten a taste for BDSM, though, she's raring for more---this time, from Magia Azure.

title: The Explosive Leopard!
overview: Utena visits Enormita's evil lair, Nacht Base, where she meets Aragawa Kiwi, AKA Leoparde. Despite claiming they should be friends, Leoparde attacks her!

title: Everyone Loves the Tres Magia!
overview: Tres Magia's main job is to take down Enormita, but they've got side jobs too, like maintaining appearances! They're in the middle of a photoshoot when it’s interrupted...

title: Neroalice in Wonderland
overview: Utena and Kiwi meet a new member of their evil team, Neroalice. Venalita soon gives them a demonstration of what the young girl can do to their magical girl enemies...

title: The Tres Magia's Secret Backstory
overview: Haruka runs into Korisu at the park, and they have a grand time playing house together. When Korisu is sad to see her leave, the villain uses her powers to keep playtime going!

title: Azure In Trouble
overview: After recent battles with Enormita, Azure wonders why she can't keep her head on straight. Stealing time for herself, she finds herself in a compromised situation.

title: Here Comes the Lord Squad!
overview: Baiser meets the original Enormita squad, and they're none too happy about the antics with the magical girls. However, they're willing to give them a second chance.

title: Gushing Over Pop Idols!
overview: Loco Musica's trying to fulfill her dream of becoming a pop idol, until Baiser and the crew crash her concert! Can Loco turn the tides in the following battle?

title: Loco x Leber
overview: Loco and Leber defect and want to rejoin Utena. However, first they must participate in a “team building” exercise of Utena’s wicked design.

title: Gushing Over World Domination!
overview: Lord Enorme is at her wit's end with the traitorous villain who refuses to join her in her quest for world domination. Baiser finds a creative way to defeat Lord Enorme.

title: Supreme Commander Magia Baiser Calls the Shots
overview: Everyone took a beating during the battle with Lord: both the exhausted Enormita villains and the city itself! When the magical girls show up, Utena happens to run into Azure.

title: Still Gushing Over Magical Girls
overview: Utena and the gang head to the beach for a day off. But their summer fun won't last when Enormita and the Tres Magia show up to duke it out!
